test_suite: US-04 Integration Tests - Consolidate Multiple Questions

tests.name: Two related submission questions
tests.description: Two questions about data submission should be detected
tests.query: How do I submit a data request? What documents do I need?

tests.name: Three related eligibility questions
tests.description: Questions about eligibility requirements should be detected
tests.query: What are the eligibility requirements? What documents do I need to submit? How long does the process take?

tests.name: Process and timeline questions
tests.description: Questions about process and timeline should be detected
tests.query: What is the data request process? How many steps? When will I get the data?

tests.name: Status and approval questions
tests.description: Questions about status and approval should be detected
tests.query: What is the status of my request? When will it be approved? How do I check progress?

tests.name: Submission form field questions
tests.description: Multiple questions about form fields should be detected
tests.query: What information is required in the abstract field? How detailed should the data description be? Do I need to attach supporting documents?

tests.name: Different topic questions
tests.description: Questions on completely different topics should be detected
tests.query: How do I submit a data request? What is the current weather?
tests.verification: Both questions detected, but should not consolidate

tests.name: Mixed domain questions
tests.description: Questions from different domains should be detected separately
tests.query: How do I submit? Can you teach me Python? What's your favorite book?
tests.verification: Multiple questions detected from different domains

tests.name: Contradictory questions
tests.query: Can I submit unlimited requests? What is the maximum limit?

tests.name: Single question
tests.description: Single question should not trigger multiple question handling
tests.query: How do I submit a data request?
tests.verification: Detected as single question, no consolidation

tests.name: Complex single question with AND
tests.description: Single complex question with AND handling
tests.query: How do I submit a request and what documents are needed?

tests.name: Many questions (too many)
tests.description: Too many questions (6+) should be detected and flagged
tests.query: Question 1? Question 2? Question 3? Question 4? Question 5? Question 6?

tests.name: Empty query
tests.description: Empty query should be handled gracefully

tests.name: Whitespace only
tests.description: Whitespace-only query should be handled gracefully

tests.name: Real researcher query - multi-step process
tests.description: Realistic researcher asking about multi-step process
tests.query: I'm new to the data request system. What is the first step? What should I prepare beforehand? How long does the entire process take from start to end?

tests.name: Real researcher query - troubleshooting
tests.query: I submitted my request 2 weeks ago. Why hasn't it been approved yet? Is there something wrong with my submission? What should I do next?

notes: Tests focus on detection accuracy, not consolidation threshold tuning
Integration tests validate that questions are correctly identified
Edge cases verify graceful handling of unusual input
Real-world tests simulate typical researcher queries
